auth.subtitle: Bouw je neonspoor, jaag op topscores en ontgrendel premium skins.
auth.verificationSent: We hebben een 6-cijferige code naar je e-mail gestuurd.
auth.verificationCreated: Verificatiecode gemaakt. E-mailbezorging is nog niet geconfigureerd.
auth.forgotHelp: Enter your account email. If the account exists, a secure reset link will be sent.
auth.resetSent: If that email exists, reset instructions have been sent.
auth.passwordResetDone: Password changed. You can log in now.

menu.title: Neon wave runner
menu.subtitle: Ontwijk de arena, verzamel energie en duw je spoor verder in elke run.

shop.title: Skinwinkel
shop.subtitle: Bekijk, ontgrendel en draag cosmetische skins.

inventory.title: Skininventaris
inventory.subtitle: Rust je pijlskin uit en kies de lichtlijn die achter je aan loopt in de game.
inventory.loadoutHint: De pijl verandert de speler zelf. De lijn verandert het lange spoor erachter.
inventory.empty: Nog geen skins in deze categorie.

settings.title: Instellingen
settings.paymentsNote: Betaalproviders kunnen worden gekoppeld na productieconfiguratie.
settings.adsNote: Beloningsadvertenties kunnen aansluiten op de wallet-beloningen.

terms.title: Terms of use
items: You agree to play fairly and not manipulate score, coins, skins, ads, requests, or game sessions.
Developer tools, request editing, automation, scripts, modified clients, and score tampering are not allowed during gameplay.
The game may pause or block a run when developer tools or suspicious behavior are detected.
Admins may review suspicious activity, remove unfair leaderboard results, ban accounts, unban accounts, and send moderation notices.
Bans include a reason written by an admin. Players who report real security issues can receive public or private thanks.
Purchases, ad rewards, roulette rewards, and coins are validated server-side. Client-only changes are not trusted.
Bots, mass account creation, spam, harassment, insults, threats, offensive support messages, payment abuse, and attempts to bypass restrictions are forbidden.
Support requests must be respectful and honest. Abusive messages can be rejected and may lead to account moderation.

security.devtoolsBody: This run was paused for fair play. Close developer tools and start a new run.

admin.title: Admin control
admin.subtitle: Review players, protect the leaderboard, ban rule breakers, unban accounts, and thank people who help improve the game.
admin.defaultBanReason: Score manipulation or Terms of use violation.
admin.defaultThanks: Thank you for helping us find and fix a security issue in Waves Arcade.

banReasons.harassment: Harassment, threats, hate speech, or insults.
banReasons.spam: Spam, repeated fake reports, or flooding support.
banReasons.multiAccount: Multiple accounts used to bypass limits or bans.
banReasons.paymentFraud: Payment, ad reward, or shop abuse.
banReasons.devtools: Developer tools or modified client used during gameplay.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Send a message to the admin team about bugs, accounts, shop issues, payments, bans, or anything that needs review.
support.subject: Subject
